violations.text: The ceiling in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026

The ceiling in kitchen area was observed to have drywall patching in areas damaged by previous roof leaks. Per the PIC, repairs are currently taking place. Ceiling is to be covered/finished with material(s) that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
